description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Builders that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master and subviews branches. Use a macos-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Homebrew and required libraries, configures the build environment, uses a compiler cache with sccache, builds and installs the project, displays build cache statistics, sets up SSH if a push event occurs, and uploads the build to SourceForge.
